since_last: 58% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.55%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.29% · BTC -0.38% · Gold -0.01% · Nasdaq100 +0.74%. 58% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.55%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.55%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.82%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.82%, AMBA +4.27%, MDB +4.14%, MRVL +4.02%, AMD +3.38%. Laggards: ORCL -3.66%, ADBE -3.62%, NOW -2.65%, INTU -2.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.01% at $121.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
